title: Big blow to Trump: US Supreme Court junks executive order restricting birthright citizenship
GatiShakti, reforms & Aatmanirbharta: Inside PM Modi's marathon meet with top govt officials
'Stripped him, forced him to ... ': Temple priest 'abducted, assaulted' in Bangladesh
summary: A Hindu law student and temple priest, Subhash Deuri, was allegedly abducted and assaulted in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Unidentified men held him captive, subjected him to torture, and forced him to arrange ransom payments. He was later found unconscious and hospitalized. Authorities are investigating the motive behind the incident, with no police complaint yet lodged.

title: England's Playing XI vs India in 1st T20I: Archer OUT; Buttler and Salt to open
summary: England has unveiled their formidable playing XI for the opening T20I against India, captained by Harry Brook.  Boasting over 650 T20 international caps, the seasoned squad features a strong batting lineup including Phil Salt, Jos Buttler, and Brook himself.  With a balanced attack led by Saqib Mahmood and Adil Rashid, England aims to leverage their home advantage in the highly anticipated five-match series opener.

title: Remember endless tabs & rabbit holes? How AI is changing the web we grew up with
summary: The internet's evolution from a browsing landscape to an AI-driven answer engine is reshaping user habits. Once a journey of exploration, the web now offers instant, customized responses, saving time but potentially narrowing discovery. This shift impacts digital publishing and marketing, forcing a redefinition of online visibility beyond traditional clicks. While offering convenience, AI browsing also raises significant privacy and security concerns.

title: Sergey Brin sold his NYC real estate: Here's what Mamdani's rent freeze cost him
summary: Google co-founder Sergey Brin has exited New York City real estate at a steep loss, selling his stake in struggling landlord A&E Real Estate for just six cents on the dollar. The Bloomberg-reported sale lands as Mayor Zohran Mamdani's rent freeze on one million rent-stabilized apartments squeezes landlords already battered by 2019 rent laws, soaring costs and mounting unpaid rent.

title: 'Huge distraction': Strauss questions timing of Ben Stokes' retirement
summary: Former England captain Andrew Strauss has voiced concerns over Ben Stokes' retirement announcement during the crucial Test against New Zealand, deeming it a significant distraction. Strauss believes such news should be shared either before or after a match to maintain team focus. Stokes, an exceptional all-rounder, retires with numerous records, including the most Test sixes and a rare double of over 7,000 runs and 250 wickets.

title: 20% ethanol blending still an experiment, results by next year: Centre tells SC
summary: Appearing for the Centre, Attorney General R Venkataramani argued that any judicial intervention in the allocation process at this stage could unsettle the government's national ethanol blending policy. He submitted that the 20 per cent ethanol blending programme remained an ongoing experiment and that its impact would become clearer by next year, reported news agency PTI.

title: '994 days of genocide': Microsoft engineer quits, emails thousands on his final day
summary: A Microsoft data center technician in Italy resigned on his final day, emailing thousands of colleagues across Europe to accuse the company of powering Israel's war in Gaza through its Azure cloud and European data centers. Published by No Azure for Apartheid, the email cites the Unit 8200 surveillance exposé and urges Microsoft workers to "reclaim our labor" and divest.

title: 'Nothing to do with India': England cricketer clarifies after accusing ICC of bias
summary: England cricketers Kate Cross and Alex Hartley have faced severe backlash, including death threats, after their criticism of the ICC's Women's T20 World Cup semi-final scheduling was misinterpreted. They clarified their comments targeted the tournament's policy, not the Indian team, which was automatically placed in an earlier slot if they qualified. The controversy became moot when India was eliminated, reverting the schedule to the standard format.

title: Gold gains strategic importance as central banks hedge against geopolitical risks
summary: Global central banks are boosting gold reserves amidst rising geopolitical risks, with a significant portion planning to reduce US dollar exposure. A new survey reveals a strategic shift towards gold for protection, while the euro and renminbi are eyed as alternatives, though not without their own challenges. Central banks are also increasingly embracing AI for operational improvements, adapting to a world of persistent uncertainty.

title: ‘Is she having an affair?’ Ketan's father claims in FIR his son suspected Siya's link with Chetan
summary: A Pune realtor's tragic fall from Lohagad Fort has led to the arrest of his fiancée and her alleged paramour, believed to be involved in his death. Reports indicate that the victim had voiced concerns regarding infidelity and was troubled by his fiancée's actions before the fatal incident. Ignoring family warnings about her history due to their connections, the investigation now delves deeper into this suspected murder case.

title: Teacher, counsellor & translator: San Diego school unveils $500,000 ChatGPT-powered robots
US stocks today: Wall Street edges higher on quarter-end optimism as Nvidia rebounds
summary: US markets saw a mixed trading session as investors weighed a rebound in AI stocks against persistent concerns about interest rates and global tensions. While major indices showed modest gains, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq are set for their first monthly dip in three months. Stronger-than-expected jobs data hints at a resilient economy, but also fuels inflation worries and potential Fed rate hikes.

title: Mumbai rains: 11-year-old dies as tree crushes school van carrying 15 students
summary: The incident took place near Heritage Pride and was reported to the Mumbai Fire Brigade at 2.58 pm. Fire brigade personnel, police, a 108 ambulance and BMC ward staff rushed to the spot and carried out a rescue operation. Officials said all 15 students were travelling in the Universal High School van when the tree was uprooted and fell on the vehicle.

title: UP TGT result 2026 released at upessc.up.gov.in: Direct link to download scorecards here
summary: The Uttar Pradesh Trained Graduate Teacher (UP TGT) result for 2026 has been officially released by the UPESSC on their website. Candidates can now check their selection status by downloading the result PDF. Those whose roll numbers are listed are considered qualified for the next recruitment phase.  It is crucial to verify all details and stay updated on the official UPESSC portal for further information.

title: Psychology says people who love jungle safaris are often high in ‘Openness to Experience’
summary: Thrill-seekers drawn to jungle safaris often exhibit high 'Openness to Experience,' a personality trait linked to curiosity and a desire for novel encounters. Psychologists suggest this trait fuels the enjoyment of unpredictable wildlife sightings and the immersive journey itself. Beyond excitement, nature's embrace is found to enhance creative thinking and foster a deeper connection to the environment, inspiring conservation efforts.

title: Cowboys linked to $53M Colts star in blockbuster NFL trade proposal
summary: The Dallas Cowboys have been named a potential landing spot for Indianapolis Colts star Jonathan Taylor in a proposed trade. CBS Sports' Garrett Podell suggested the All-Pro running back could be available for a third-round pick if the Colts struggle in 2026. With Taylor entering the final year of his contract and coming off another standout season, Dallas could pursue him if its rushing attack fails to meet expectations.

title: Brittany Mahomes shares heartfelt promise inspired by Patrick Mahomes
summary: Brittany Mahomes says becoming a mother has made her more ambitious and intentional about pursuing her goals. She hopes her children, Sterling, Bronze, and Golden, see both her and Patrick Mahomes working hard and following their dreams. Brittany believes leading by example will teach them that success comes through determination and perseverance. She also shared that her daughter Sterling has shown growing interest in her work, making those moments even more meaningful.

title: 'I'm very happy': Jadeja reacts to Ben Stokes' shock retirement
summary: Former India captain Ajay Jadeja lauded Ben Stokes' retirement, calling it the "right call" and a testament to his refusal to be dictated by external forces. Jadeja admired Stokes' principled stand, suggesting the all-rounder wouldn't tolerate administrators controlling his personal life.  Meanwhile, Sanjay Manjrekar expressed sadness, calling Stokes' departure an "end of an era" and highlighting his match-winning prowess on the big stage.
